dismissalText.long: c Shashank Singh b Arshdeep Singh
dismissalText.commentary: Ryan Rickelton c Shashank Singh b Arshdeep Singh 2 (8b 0x4 0x6 10m) SR: 25

dismissalComment.html: A 100 IPL wickets for Arshdeep Singh! One fielder in the deep on the legside and Rickelton has found him to perfection. Was a hit-me delivery but Rickelton can't cash in. Arshdeep won't mind it one bit. Length ball on his pad which Rickelton could have smashed anywhere. He picks it cleanly but only as far as Shashank at deep backward square leg who takes a simple catch

dismissalText.commentary: Suryakumar Yadav c Chahal b Arshdeep Singh 0 (1b 0x4 0x6 1m) SR: 0

dismissalComment.html: SKY comes, SKY falls. Wicket No. 101 did not take much time for Arshdeep. Plenty of swing on the 136.9kph length ball angling across Suryakumar. He looks for a drive, can only manage a thick outside edge that goes to Chahal at short third. Arshdeep is on a celebratory run

dismissalText.commentary: Naman Dhir c Bartlett b Shashank Singh 50 (31b 3x4 3x6 59m) SR: 161.29

dismissalComment.html: Shanked, Naman gets Shashanked! 125ks Wobble ball on a length just outside off, Dhir went for a lofted straight drive on the up. Bat face opened and it went flat. Bartlett was well inside the ropes and was back-tracking even while taking it with hands above his head. Held his balance well

image.longCaption: Xavier Bartlett, player portrait

dismissalText.commentary: Hardik Pandya c Bartlett b Jansen 14 (12b 0x4 1x6 20m) SR: 116.66

dismissalComment.html: Shreyas brings on elite athleticism... and showmanship! This is being checked but that looked a once-in-a-lifetime relay! Shreyas started close to the ropes, jumped back and was in mid-air as he first caught the ball... and when he threw the ball in to Bartlett. He was in a limbo but still had the strength to throw it with decent control, and right as he rose he signalled for the spotlight. Was a wide knuckle ball on a length that Hardik looked to slap. Bottom hand came off upon contact but then it was all Iyer

dismissalText.commentary: Ryan Rickelton c Shashank Singh b Arshdeep Singh 2 (8b 0x4 0x6 10m) SR: 25

dismissalComment.html: A 100 IPL wickets for Arshdeep Singh! One fielder in the deep on the legside and Rickelton has found him to perfection. Was a hit-me delivery but Rickelton can't cash in. Arshdeep won't mind it one bit. Length ball on his pad which Rickelton could have smashed anywhere. He picks it cleanly but only as far as Shashank at deep backward square leg who takes a simple catch

dismissalText.commentary: Hardik Pandya c Bartlett b Jansen 14 (12b 0x4 1x6 20m) SR: 116.66

dismissalComment.html: Shreyas brings on elite athleticism... and showmanship! This is being checked but that looked a once-in-a-lifetime relay! Shreyas started close to the ropes, jumped back and was in mid-air as he first caught the ball... and when he threw the ball in to Bartlett. He was in a limbo but still had the strength to throw it with decent control, and right as he rose he signalled for the spotlight. Was a wide knuckle ball on a length that Hardik looked to slap. Bottom hand came off upon contact but then it was all Iyer
